description: Braiin Limited operates as an agriculture and analytics services company that provides solutions to improve farming productivity using IoTs, Wireless Connectivity, Robotics, Software, and AI/ML in Australia and New Zealand. The company was incorporated in 2022 and is based in Subiaco, Australia. As of March 20, 2023, Braiin Limited operates as a subsidiary of Northern Revival Acquisition Corporation.
